Actions.use_case: Provisioning a temporary flexible server via point-in-time restore in the Rubrik-managed resource group.
Deleting the temporary flexible server after backup data extraction is complete.
Retrieving the list of firewall rules for the specified flexible server.
Creating firewall rules on the source server to allow Exocompute pod access when using public access.
Removing firewall rules from the server during teardown.
Read the properties of the User-Assigned Managed Identity (UMI) before assigning it.
Assign the UMI to the target Azure Postgres flexible server, giving it an identity to access Key Vault.
